hero.headline: I build agent systems that do real work.
hero.sub: Voice agents that answer phones. An agent team that ships code. Pipelines that cut manual prospecting by 80%. I design multi-agent systems end-to-end and pick the stack per problem, not per habit.

about: I'm an AI engineer and computer science engineering student at Esprit in Tunis, specialized in generative AI and multi-agent systems. I design intelligent assistants and automation systems that reduce manual work and improve decision-making.
I continuously explore new tools and frameworks to build the right stack per use case, always prioritizing the most relevant solution over a familiar one.
